title: [SAMPLE] Referral link does not auto-link homeowner to agent
steps_to_reproduce: 1. Agent logs in. 2. Copies referral link. 3. Homeowner opens link in incognito. 4. Homeowner completes service form.
expected_result: Homeowner account auto-links to the agent in both agent and admin dashboards.
actual_result: Homeowner account created but no agent association visible in admin dashboard.
notes: First observed during manual test of referral flow.

title: [SAMPLE] Wording on service request form unclear for insurance section
steps_to_reproduce: 1. Homeowner opens service request form. 2. Reaches insurance section.
expected_result: Insurance field label and helper text clearly indicate to enter the agent email.
actual_result: Label reads 'Agent Code' but the testing guide specifies agent email is entered here. Confusing for end users.
notes: May be intentional – confirm with Chris before flagging as bug.
